data.title: Continental Holdings Proposes New Articles of Association
data.description:
An announcement from Continental Holdings Limited ( (HK:0513) ) is now available.

Continental Holdings Limited has announced a proposal to adopt a new set of articles of association, replacing the existing ones from 2004. This change aims to align with the recent amendments in the Companies Ordinance and the latest requirements under the Hong Kong Stock Exchange Listing Rules, facilitating a more modern and efficient corporate governance structure. The new articles will enable the company to conduct hybrid or virtual general meetings and incorporate electronic voting, reflecting current market practices. The proposal is subject to shareholder approval at the annual general meeting scheduled for December 15, 2025.

More about Continental Holdings Limited

Average Trading Volume: 58,761

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$119.5M

data.title: TOMRA Systems ASA to Release Q3 2025 Results
data.description:
Tomra Systems ASA ( (GB:0KV7) ) just unveiled an announcement.

TOMRA Systems ASA announced that its third quarter 2025 results will be released on 17 October 2025, with a presentation by the President & CEO and CFO. The results presentation will be available via a live webcast, with a recorded version accessible afterward. This announcement highlights TOMRA’s commitment to transparency and engagement with analysts and investors, which could strengthen its market position and stakeholder relations.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0KV7) stock is a Hold with a NOK155.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tomra Systems ASA stock, see the GB:0KV7 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tomra Systems ASA

TOMRA Systems ASA is a company that develops solutions for circular economies and optimal resource productivity through automated identification, collection, grading, and sorting of resources. The company aims to optimize how resources are obtained, used, and reused, effectively turning waste into valuable resources. TOMRA operates approximately 113,700 installations in over 100 markets worldwide, with total revenues of EUR 1,348 million in 2024, and employs 5,300 people globally. It is publicly listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 359,637

Current Market Cap: NOK42.88B

data.title: RareX Limited Announces 2025 AGM Date and Director Elections
data.description:
An update from RareX Limited ( (AU:REE) ) is now available.

RareX Limited has announced the date for its 2025 Annual General Meeting, which is scheduled for November 28, 2025. A key agenda item for the meeting will be the election of directors, with nominations closing on October 17, 2025. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it will determine the company’s leadership and potentially influence its strategic direction.

More about RareX Limited

RareX Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of rare earth elements. The company is based in Australia and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker ASX:REE.

data.title: Sunwah Kingsway Capital Holdings Limited Disposes Alibaba Shares for Strategic Gains
data.description:
Sunwah Kingsway Capital Holdings Limited ( (HK:0188) ) has provided an announcement.

Sunwah Kingsway Capital Holdings Limited announced the disposal of 100,000 Alibaba shares through on-market transactions, generating approximately HK$10,849,000. This move allows the company to realize cash resources for general working capital and potential future investments, while also securing a gain of approximately HK$1 million. The transactions were deemed fair and in the best interest of the company and its shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0188) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sunwah Kingsway Capital Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:0188 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: China Galaxy Securities Announces H Share Register Closure for EGM
data.description:
China Galaxy Securities Co ( (HK:6881) ) has provided an update.

China Galaxy Securities Co., Ltd. has announced the closure of its H Share register of members to determine the entitlement of shareholders to attend and vote at the upcoming extraordinary general meeting (EGM) scheduled for October 31, 2025. This move is significant for stakeholders as it outlines the procedural steps for shareholder participation in the EGM, which will address important resolutions impacting the company’s governance and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6881) stock is a Buy with a HK$13.99 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Galaxy Securities Co stock, see the HK:6881 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Galaxy Securities Co

China Galaxy Securities Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the financial services industry. The company is primarily focused on providing securities brokerage, investment banking, and asset management services, with a market focus on the Chinese financial sector.

data.title: Xspray Pharma Announces Nomination Committee for 2026 AGM
data.description:
Xspray Pharma AB ( (SE:XSPRAY) ) has shared an announcement.

Xspray Pharma AB has announced the composition of its Nomination Committee for the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026. The committee, formed according to the principles set in the previous AGM, will prepare proposals for the election of board members and other key positions. This announcement is part of Xspray’s ongoing corporate governance efforts, ensuring stakeholder involvement in the strategic direction of the company.

More about Xspray Pharma AB

Xspray Pharma AB is a pharmaceutical company specializing in developing improved versions of marketed protein kinase inhibitors (PKI) for cancer treatment. Utilizing its patented HyNap™ technology, the company aims to lead the oncology market segment with its innovative drug candidates, including Dasynoc®, which is under FDA review, and other optimized versions of existing cancer drugs.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Bezant Resources Reports Progress in Mankayan Project
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bezant Resources ( (GB:BZT) ).

Bezant Resources announced that Blackstone Minerals has achieved major milestones in its Mankayan Copper-Gold project in the Philippines. These include a two-year work program extension approved by the Philippine government, securing land and community access, and obtaining indigenous consent, marking a historic first in the region. These developments are expected to enhance the project’s potential and strengthen Blackstone’s operational and community engagement efforts.

More about Bezant Resources

Bezant Resources Plc is a copper-gold exploration and development company focused on advancing its projects in the mining industry. The company holds a significant shareholding in Blackstone Minerals Ltd, which is involved in the development of the Mankayan Copper-Gold porphyry project in the Philippines.

Average Trading Volume: 103,916,098

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £14.41M
